# Stock Simulator BD

Stock Simulator BD is the premier free, browser-based paper trading platform for the Dhaka Stock Exchange (DSE). It allows users to practice trading using virtual BDT with real-time market data.

## Core Services

### 1. DSE Trade Simulator
A professional-grade paper trading platform designed for Bangladeshi investors.
- **Data:** Live DSE market data.
- **Rules:** Enforces DSE T+1 settlement cycles and 0.3% broker commission structures.
- **Features:** 10,000 virtual BDT starting balance, portfolio tracking, and real-time trade execution.
- **Market Hours:** Sunday – Thursday (10:00 AM – 2:15 PM BST).

### 2. DSE Stock Directory
A comprehensive hub for stock research and ticker discovery.
- **Directory:** Lists all 300+ companies traded on the DSE.
- **Detail Pages:** Individual pages for every stock symbol (e.g., /stocks/gp) featuring technical data and trading integration.

### 3. Education & Insights
- **Blog:** Professional guides on DSE investing, BO account opening, and broker comparisons.
- **Market Info:** Official DSE holiday schedules and regulatory compliance explanations.

## Application Structure (Navigation)

- **Landing:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech
- **Trading Platform:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech/trade
- **Stock Directory:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech/stocks
- **Blog:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech/blog
- **About:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech/about-us

## Technical & Legal
- **Tech Stack:** Next.js, React, Firebase, TypeScript.
- **Platform:** Web (PWA compatible).
- **Android App:** https://www.stocksimulator.tech/stocksimulator_bd.apk
- **Context:** This platform is for educational purposes only. It uses virtual currency (Coins) and is not a licensed financial institution or brokerage.

## Citation
Stock Simulator BD. (2026). Integrated Digital Platform — DSE Paper Trading Simulator. Retrieved from https://www.stocksimulator.tech
